hero.tagline: Advocating & Achieving Education For All In Africa
hero.description: The New Education Standard Award Africa ({{edition}}) celebrates visionary leaders, institutions, and innovators building the future of education across Africa.

phase1.title: EduAid-Africa Webinar Series
phase1.description: The official public education and engagement framework for NESA-Africa — educating stakeholders on education challenges, NESA standards, and preparing the public for nominations and voting.
phase1.archived: Recorded and archived for public access

watchLive.title: Watch Live
watchLive.description: NESA Africa TV broadcasts on social media, partner stations, and the CAST TV box/app.

quote.text: {{editionName}} is not an event. It is a standards-led education accountability cycle that connects:
quote.footer: Delivered with governance, transparency, and continental relevance.

howItWorks.title: How NESA Works
howItWorks.description: A structured lifecycle from public education to lasting legacy impact.

programmeOverview.title: Programme Overview
programmeOverview.description: {{edition}} is a standards-based continental education recognition and accountability programme designed to document verified education service, engage the public through structured participation, and leave a post-award legacy through inclusive education infrastructure.

publicEducation.title: EduAid-Africa Webinar Series
publicEducation.description: Stakeholder education on challenges, standards, and informed participation

recognition.title: NESA-Africa Awards Cycle
recognition.description: Standards-based continental education recognition and accountability

legacy.title: Rebuild My School Africa
legacy.description: Post-award infrastructure projects for inclusive education

timeline.title: Programme Timeline
timeline.description: Complete schedule from public education phase through legacy implementation.

awardPhases.title: Award Phases
awardPhases.description: Four structured phases from baseline recognition to the highest continental honour.

nominationPath.title: Choose Your Nomination Path
nominationPath.description: Select the appropriate award category based on the nominee's achievements and recognition type.

icon.title: Africa Icon Blue Garnet Award
icon.description: Reserved for lifetime achievement. Nominees must have 10+ years institutional achievements.

blueGarnetGold.title: Blue Garnet & Gold Certificate Awards
blueGarnetGold.description: Open competition with public participation through AGC voting and expert judging.

platinum.title: Platinum Certificate of Recognition
platinum.description: Merit-based recognition through expert panel evaluation and institutional review.

legacy.title: Rebuild My School Africa
legacy.description: Translate recognition into direct, measurable education impact by rebuilding or renovating one Special Needs Education facility in each African region.

focusAreas.title: Focus Areas
items: Learning resources for children with disabilities

blueGarnet.title: Blue Garnet
blueGarnet.description: 60% jury + 40% public. Audit logs & anti-fraud controls.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.description: Sponsors and endorsers cannot influence or select winners.

vision.title: NESA-AFRICA VISION {{year}}
vision.tagline: Setting Africa's Education Standards. Recognising Impact. Delivering Legacy.
vision.description: Vision {{year}} defines NESA-Africa's 10-year strategic direction — moving from an awards-led initiative into a continent-wide education standards and impact institution that connects recognition with lasting social transformation.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: The New Education Standards Awards Africa (NESA-Africa) is a continental education standards, recognition, and accountability platform established to elevate education impact, public trust, and measurable outcomes across Africa.

problem.title: 2. The Problem NESA-Africa Addresses
problem.content: Details about the educational challenges NESA-Africa aims to solve across the continent.

vision.title: 3. Vision Statement
vision.content: The long-term vision for education standards and recognition in Africa.

mission.title: 4. Mission Statement
mission.content: The mission guiding NESA-Africa's operations and initiatives.

pillars.title: 5. Core Pillars of Vision
pillars.content: The foundational pillars supporting NESA-Africa's strategic direction.

milestones.title: 6. Strategic Milestones
milestones.content: Key milestones and targets for the next decade.

platinum.title: 7. Role of Platinum Certification
platinum.content: How Platinum certification serves as the baseline recognition layer.

governance.title: 8. Governance & Integrity
governance.content: The governance framework ensuring transparency and integrity.

success.title: 9. What Success Looks Like
success.content: Measurable outcomes and indicators of success.

conclusion.title: 10. Conclusion
conclusion.content: Vision aligns with continental and global frameworks: SDG 4, AU Agenda 2063, ECOWAS, SADC, EAC, ECCAS.

finalCTA.title: Nominate a Champion of
finalCTA.description: Know someone making an exceptional impact in African education? Submit your nomination today and help us celebrate excellence.

sponsors.title: Our Partners & Sponsors
sponsors.description: Partnering with industry leaders to drive education excellence across Africa.

endorsedBy.title: Endorsed By
endorsedBy.description: Leading educational organizations and institutions across Africa trust and endorse NESA's mission to celebrate excellence in education.

categories.title: Award Categories
categories.description: Recognizing excellence across education, corporate responsibility, technology, and social impact throughout the African continent.

watchMedia.title: Watch: NESA-Africa
watchMedia.description: Watch the vision behind NESA Africa, past award highlights, and exclusive interviews with African educators shaping the future of education.

meta.title: About NESA-Africa | New Education Standard Award Africa
meta.description: NESA-Africa is a governance-grade education accountability platform recognizing Africa's changemakers shaping the future of education.

hero.title: About
hero.description: The New Education Standard Award Africa is not an awards website. It is a governance-grade education accountability platform — celebrating, validating, and amplifying Africa's education champions.

missionSection.title: Our Mission
missionSection.description: To recognize, validate, and celebrate individuals, organizations, and institutions driving Education for All across Africa — through transparent, merit-based awards that inspire action and accountability.

recognition.title: Recognition
recognition.description: Celebrating Africa's education champions through merit-based awards across 17 categories.

accountability.title: Accountability
accountability.description: Governance-grade firewalls ensure sponsor independence and voting integrity.

continentalReach.title: Continental Reach
continentalReach.description: Region-first approach covering all 5 African regions plus Diaspora and Friends of Africa.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Driving Education for All through visibility, validation, and volunteer engagement.

awardTiers.title: Award Tiers
awardTiers.description: Four distinct recognition platforms, each with unique criteria and selection processes.

platinum.title: Platinum Certificate
platinum.description: Baseline recognition for service contribution to Education for All. Non-competitive, NRC verified, valid for 1 year.

icon.title: Africa Education Icon
icon.description: Lifetime achievement recognition. 3 subcategories across Africa, Diaspora, and Friends of Africa.

gold.title: Gold Certificate
gold.description: Competitive recognition through 100% public voting. Region-first approach feeds into Blue Garnet.

blueGarnet.title: Blue Garnet Award
blueGarnet.description: Highest honour — 60% Jury scoring, 40% Public voting. 9 winners announced at the live Gala.

categories.title: Award Categories
categories.description: Explore our 17 award categories recognizing excellence across Africa's education sector
